ground_truth.title: VITALITY ELIXIR facial serum to rejuvenate + nourish
ground_truth.main_content:
The VITALITY ELIXIR

active antioxidant rejuvenating serum

Strategically formulated with thoroughly researched, high-performance, nutrient-rich actives to create a rejuvenating multi-correctional synergy for a complexion that glows with youthful vitality.

The VITALITY ELIXIR helps to:

- rejuvenate troubled / aging skin by relieving oxidative stress
- soothe inflammation that causes acne
- stimulate cellular turnover and resiliency
- protect the skin from free-radical / environmental damage
- lighten visual appearance of age spots, wrinkles, scarring and improve skin's micro-texture
- nourish the skin with vital nutrient-rich molecular building blocks for skin that's clear, hydrated, firm and radiant

Why you need it:

The VITALITY ELIXIR active antioxidant rejuvenating serum tenderly cares for your skin with it's intelligent synergy of fine ingredients. Infused with "secret weapon" antioxidant Astaxanthin, age defying CoEnzyme Q10, and everlasting regeneration of Helichrysum flower, the sumptuous elixir helps to inhibit inflammatory enzymes, scavenge free radicals, fade and manage wrinkles and tissue scarring, deliver deeply hydrating, and regenerative properties. It is powerfully potent in aiding to soothe inflammation that cause acne, balance oil production and stimulate growth of new cells, all while making skin appear firm, youthful and vibrant.

Who is it for?

All skin types, from oily to dry skins. Ideal for urban-dwellers to repair and protect against damage by environmental pollutants.

Experience:

Water-free oil serum. Dark golden-orange hued from raw, unrefined, antioxidant rich oils and extracts.

Aroma:

Crisp, slightly floral and fresh, earthy and lightly nutty. Notes of rose, geranium, frankincense, bergamot and immortelle.

Your MAHALO ritual : how to use

Massage 1-2 pumps of serum onto cleansed face, neck, and decollete while skin is still damp, or following The Flower of Flowers and/or HAWAIIAN HYDRATION. Use as part of your morning and evening skincare ritual. This serum can also be used as a primer or mixed-in with your foundation for a dewy finish.

Microemulsion

THIS, can double your skin care results with no effort. In the palm of your hand combine 1-3 pumps of The HAWAIIAN HYDRATION with 1-2 pumps of The VITALITY ELIXIR for your own alchemized blend of hydration (from the concentrate) and moisture (from the serum) for a vital glow that lasts and lasts.

What's Inside?

here are some key ingredients

Serum's key active ingredients are produced via proprietary supercritical CO2 extraction method, a gentle oxygen and solvent-free process that delivers the purest, and most potent extract that retain the near-identical chemical profile of the raw plant.

The luscious golden-ruby drops of this facial serum pack a high amount of A, B, and C Vitamins and minerals including potassium, copper, zinc and selenium, that provide the skin with fine molecular building blocks it needs to recover and repair itself.

Helichrysum

Everlasting regeneration. The jewel in the aroma, and another star active of the Vitality Elixir is the world's finest, the pinnacle of perfect immortelle from Corsica, Helichrysum Italicum. Helichrysum offers high levels of regenerative italidiones, as well as rare diketones, which stimulate growth of new skin tissue, fade scars, stretch marks and blemishes. Being a rich powerhouse of anti-inflammatory curcuminoids, Helichrysum aids in healing skin on a deep cellular level. The aroma is deeply calming to the mind, allowing you to relax and rejuvenate both your skin and spirit.

Black Cumin

Ancient panacea. Boasts luxurious benefits when applied topically, especially if produced via the supercritical CO2 extraction method. It's ability to restore vibrancy and youthful vitality to the skin is unparalleled to any other plant ingredients. Praised for it's potency at fighting bacteria that causes acne, rosacea, eczema, and other skin infections; as well as for being a potent moisturizing agent, and anti-aging booster.

Carrot Seed

Antioxidant-rich superstar. Helps to repair damaged skin tissue, address skin discoloration, improve complexion, tone and add elasticity to skin.

Astaxanthin

Astaxanthin [asta-ZAN-thin]: the powerhouse antioxidant booster. Recent clinical study found this carotenoid to be the strongest antioxidant against singlet oxygen. Asaxanthin's unparalleled ability to fight free radical scavengers is attributed to being 6,000 times stronger than vitamin C, 800 times stronger than CoQ10, 550 times stronger than green tea catechins and 75 times stronger than alpha lipoic acid. This powerhouse ingredient provides new dimension in skin treatment technology, effectively working to revitalize dull, tired, prematurely-aging and environmentally stressed skin.

Chia seed

Omega 3 powerhouse. offers one of the highest concentrations of Omega essential fatty acids in the world. Potent with antioxidants, vitamins and an alpha-linolenic acid – it maintains moisture in the skin to prevent drying and scaling. A valuable source for the body's own EPA and DHA synthesis. A powerful anti-aging ingredient.

Tamanu

A skin-healing wonder. This co-op grown oil is a remarkable restorative active with skin healing, anti-inflammatory and antioxidant benefits. Grown in mineral-rich volcanic soil of Polynesia, it is powerfully potent in soothing acne, scarring, eczema, age spots and wrinkles.

Ingredients

calophyllum inophyllum (polynesian tamanu) co-op grown oil*, salvia hispanica (chia seed) organic supercritical CO2 extract**, aleurite moluccans (kukui) nut oil*, nigella sativa (black cumin) organic supercritical CO2 extract**, haematococcus pluvialis algal (astaxanthin) extract+, daucus carota (carrot seed) organic supercritical CO2 extract**, hippophae rhamnoides (sea buckthorn) organic supercritical CO2 extract**, curcuma longa (turmeric) organic supercritical CO2 extract**, helichrysum italicum (immortelle) flower oil*, pelargonium graveolens (geranium) flower oil*, boswellia carteri (frankincense)oil*, citrus aurantium var. bergamia (bergamot fcf) bergapten-free, non-photosensitizing oil*^, rosa centifolia (rose de mai) flower oil*, ubiquinone (coenzyme Q10), non-gmo mixed tocopherols

Hand blended in small batches by MAHALO Skin Care in Hawaii, USA
with: Strategically formulated with thoroughly researched, high-performance, nutrient-rich actives to create a rejuvenating multi-correctional synergy for a complexion that glows with youthful vitality.

Infused with "secret weapon" antioxidant Astaxanthin, age defying CoEnzyme Q10, and everlasting regeneration of Helichrysum flower, the sumptuous elixir helps to inhibit inflammatory enzymes, scavenge free radicals, fade and manage wrinkles and tissue scarring, deliver deeply hydrating, and regenerative properties.
All skin types, from oily to dry skins. Ideal for urban-dwellers to repair and protect against damage by environmental pollutants.
Water-free oil serum. Dark golden-orange hued from raw, unrefined, antioxidant rich oils and extracts.
Crisp, slightly floral and fresh, earthy and lightly nutty. Notes of rose, geranium, frankincense, bergamot and immortelle.
Massage 1-2 pumps of serum onto cleansed face, neck, and decollete while skin is still damp, or following The Flower of Flowers and/or HAWAIIAN HYDRATION.

Serum's key active ingredients are produced via proprietary supercritical CO2 extraction method, a gentle oxygen and solvent-free process that delivers the purest, and most potent extract that retain the near-identical chemical profile of the raw plant.

Asaxanthin's unparalleled ability to fight free radical scavengers is attributed to being 6,000 times stronger than vitamin C, 800 times stronger than CoQ10, 550 times stronger than green tea catechins and 75 times stronger than alpha lipoic acid.
